yolo_imgsz.name: Pose inference resolution
yolo_imgsz.description: 480 (default) balances accuracy and CPU; 320 is fastest, 640 most detailed

body_upright_min.name: Body upright threshold
body_upright_min.description: Hips must be this far below shoulders (negative = fisheye OK)

body_scale_reference.name: Body scale reference
body_scale_reference.description: Torso size (frame fraction) the thresholds are tuned at — should read scale ≈ 1.0 on the debug page at your usual spot (default 0.18)

arm_above_head_tolerance.name: Arm raise margin
arm_above_head_tolerance.description: Wrist must clear the shoulder by this much (body-scaled) to count as raised

arm_above_head_tolerance_reclined.name: Arm raise margin (reclined)
arm_above_head_tolerance_reclined.description: Stricter raise margin used while lying down or when posture is unknown

forearm_route_min_margin.name: Forearm-route shoulder clearance
forearm_route_min_margin.description: Vertical-forearm raises must still clear the shoulder by this much — blocks resting-arm/phone postures (default 0.06)

leg_raise_margin.name: Leg-raise suppression margin
leg_raise_margin.description: Suppress gestures when ankle/knee rises this far above hip (0=disable)

snap_forearm_min.name: Snap forearm threshold
snap_forearm_min.description: Forearm verticality needed for SNAP (default 0.05; raise toward 0.10 if sideways arm sweeps misfire)

snap_sustain_s.name: Snap hold time (s)
snap_sustain_s.description: Arm must stay up this long before SNAP fires (default 0.20)

snap_require_rise.name: SNAP requires a rise
snap_require_rise.description: Only fire if the wrist rose from shoulder level recently — blocks long-static poses (default on)

snap_require_still.name: SNAP requires stillness
snap_require_still.description: Only fire while the raised wrist holds still — blocks pass-through reaches (default on)

wrist_still_max_travel.name: Stillness tolerance
wrist_still_max_travel.description: Max wrist travel (body-scaled) that still counts as holding still (default 0.05)

sustained_rearm_s.name: Pose re-arm time (s)
sustained_rearm_s.description: CROSS_ARMS/T_POSE/RAISE_BOTH fire once per pose; the pose must be released this long to fire again (default 2.0)

hand_crop_enable.name: Hand detection crop
hand_crop_enable.description: Run hand detection on a crop around the raised wrist — much better at couch distance (default on)
